questions.question: What is the composition of Cell Halcón?

options.A: SLATEFALL (Inez Calvache-Renström), Lt. Solène Bauer-Cortez, Sgt. Mateo Quispe-Linares, Cpl. Raúl Vendrame
options.B: PAMC Operations Directorate, Behavioral Health, Logistics, and the Cooperative Bureau of Metahuman Physics (CBMP)
options.D: The four-operative tactical unit under SLATEFALL's command

questions.question: According to Section 8, which statement best matches the topic 'Known Bases, Safehouses, and Operational Territory'?

options.A: The asset's authorized operational territory spans approximately 6.8 million km².
options.B: The asset has access to five formally maintained safehouses within her operational territory.
options.C: Safehouse provisioning is audited semi-annually by Cpl. Vendrame on behalf of the cell.
